rationale: For a data-heavy property management dashboard, clarity and authority are paramount. We use a monochrome baseline with functional color pops (Green for M-Pesa, Red for Arrears) to guide attention immediately.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Max size text-5xl for major page titles. Avoid default bold, lean into Black for emphasis.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable technical sans for data tables, lists, and forms.

rules: No Inter for headings.
Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.
Color is function only. 95% of UI is monochrome.
M-Pesa payment buttons must be M-Pesa Green (#00A651) with white text.
Arrears and overdue bills must be highlighted in Red.
Hover states must be explicitly styled (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-100).
Base grid for dashboards: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
Use dense, compact spacing for data visibility.
Grid borders: visible skeletons for tables and data lists.
Containers must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent collision with borders.

surface_styles.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border (border-zinc-200), max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). No soft shadows.
surface_styles.headers: Solid background with a hard bottom border. No glassmorphism here, keep it crisp.

components.sidebar: Fixed left, solid background (bg-zinc-50), right border (border-zinc-200).
components.cards: Use raw div structure over rigid Card components for custom dashboard widgets. Max border radius 8px.
components.tables: Shadcn Table component. Dense padding, hover states on rows. Left align data, right align currency.
components.buttons: Sharp corners or max rounded-md. Primary CTA is solid black, M-Pesa CTA is solid green.
components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Use IBM Plex Sans for input values.
components.badges: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). High contrast text.

rules: Minimalist animations.
Hover on cards: slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and border color darken (border-zinc-300).
Hover on rows: bg-zinc-50.
Required: data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., mpesa-pay-button, tenant-issue-submit).

icons.usage: Use functional icons with clear contrast. Stroke width 1.5 or 2.

property_gallery.layout: 16:10 hero image with optional thumbnail strip
rules: Use object-cover for all property images.
Uploaded property images take priority over placeholder images.
Fallback image only when images array is empty.
Support up to 5 uploaded images per property.
Property cards use first image as cover image.
Future support for carousel/slider interactions.
Touch-friendly interactions.
Minimal navigation controls.
Rounded-md image containers.
Avoid autoplay for property galleries.

image_placeholders.description: Nairobi skyline sunset for authentication page background or marketing hero.
Modern apartment building in Nairobi for property cards.
Professional African man portrait for landlord/caretaker profile avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body).
Use Shadcn UI extensively for Data Tables, Tabs (for role switching or sections), Dialogs (for issue reporting/payment).
Structure the dashboard using the 'Control Room Grid' layout (grid-cols-4).
Ensure the M-Pesa CTA stands out using the functional mpesa_green color.
Add data-testid to all key elements for testing.
Avoid soft, muddy shadows. Use 1px borders to separate elements.
All property media should use uploaded images stored in the images[] array.
Never rely on single image_url fields for property rendering.
Use first uploaded image as default property thumbnail.
Fallback to placeholder image only if no uploaded images exist.
